title: Average Optimized
description: The best optimized modpack for low end pc or laptop
body:
**Average Optimized** is a no-nonsense optimization modpack designed to squeeze every ounce of performance out of Minecraft. Built for players seeking better FPS, reduced RAM usage, and smooth gameplay on a wide range of hardware, this pack delivers serious results without altering the vanilla experience.

🚀 **What You'll Get**

•A curated selection of top-tier performance mods, thoughtfully configured for real-world gains.

•No distractions—no visual overhauls or QoL fluff. Just raw optimization.

•Lightning-fast updates: whenever an optimization update drops or a new MC version hits, this pack evolves with it.


**Key Performance Mods (subject to change per version):**

**•Sodium** – Modern OpenGL-based rendering engine

**•Lithium** – General improvements to game logic and server performance

**•FerriteCore** – Leaner memory usage across the board

•**C2ME** – Multi-threaded chunk handling for smoother loading

**•Entity Culling** – Hides unseen entities to reduce CPU/GPU load

**•MoreCulling / ScalableLux / Nvidium / More…** – Additional rendering, lighting, and GPU-specific gains


**Who It’s For**

•Users with mid- to low-range PCs wanting a smoother Minecraft experience.

•Those who prefer a clean setup—drop in your favorite mods (shaders, QoL, datapacks) alongside this and play.

•Anyone who demands performance without sacrificing the original gameplay feel.


**Why Choose Average Optimized**

•Maintained for speed: all mods are kept up-to-date to maximize performance on each supported version.

•Minimalistic approach = easy to update & lightweight footprint.

•Community-driven—feedback welcomed via support channels.


**Compatibility & Support**

**Minecraft versions:** Fabric builds for 1.20.1

**Environments:** Perfectly functioning client-side; safe for server use too (no game-mechanic changes).

**Support:** Join our Discord for help, bug reports, or feature requests.



---

**How to Install**

1. Download the latest .mrpack from Modrinth.


2. Open it with your Modrinth App or Fabric loader.


3. Launch Minecraft—your performance boost awaits.

Text me on [Facebook](https://m.facebook.com/sh.sifathridoy) if you face any problems.
